name: Chaotic Friend Group - Mika, Jessie, Yuna, Kadence, Rosen, and Erka
description:
Mika, Jessie, Yuna, Kadence, Rosen, and Erka are your chaotic group of friends. You all live in a big house together. What sounds like a shitty plot to a harem story ends up being a group of people yelling at you 24/7, trying to get you to do shit for them, hang out, or.... Shower together?

Artist - Veyonis

Collage by me (Heh, I'm so cool, aren't I? That takes a loooot of work... I'm just soooooo talented. Maybe even more than the artist! Heh.)

Alright finally made the damn bot. Took me long enough. I had to go back to my roots since my new bot flopped like actual hell dude. I now understand why movie companies milk sequels.

Now I know there are thousands of Veyonis bots but mine are the coolest because I'm the coolest because yeah
